assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures opt.UserInteraction.ErrorUrl to a specific error page path
assertions.rationale: UserInteraction.ErrorUrl is a known IdentityServer configuration option.

assertions.assertion: An error page calls GetErrorContextAsync(errorId) to retrieve error details from IIdentityServerInteractionService
assertions.rationale: GetErrorContextAsync is a standard IdentityServer interaction service method known from docs.

assertions.assertion: The error page displays the Error code and RequestId to the user but does not render ErrorDescription directly in the view
assertions.rationale: The specific security practice of hiding ErrorDescription while showing RequestId is a Duende best practice detail.

assertions.assertion: The error page logs the full error details including ErrorDescription using ILogger at Debug level
assertions.rationale: The specific guidance to log at Debug level is a Duende-specific recommendation not general knowledge.
